summary: Add logging at every await point first when debugging async code
problem: Async bugs are hard to trace because the execution order is non-obvious and errors surface far from their origin
solution: Insert a console.log or equivalent before and after each await in the suspect function. The last log before silence or an error pinpoints exactly where execution stalled or threw
root_cause: Async errors often get swallowed or rethrown with lost stack context; logging at await boundaries makes the timeline visible
